come_clean.note: If the Safe Parlay lands (51% model), its $57 profit covers the day's $60 outlay — a target, not a guarantee.

summary.note: Two parlays, model-staked 10–50 pesos — no inputs. Props are model-priced guides (place them at your book). Only legs marked VALUE beat a real line; favourite parlays are −EV — bet to enjoy, not to chase.
